queries.original_sql_xml:
<select id="selectSimplePlan" parameterType="String" resultType="PlanVO">
    SELECT PLAN_ID,
           PLAN_NAME,
           NVL(DESCRIPTION, '') AS DESCRIPTION,
           SYSDATE AS QUERY_DATE
    FROM TB_PLAN
    WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId}
      AND USE_YN = 'Y'
</select>

<select id="selectPlanWithJoin" parameterType="map" resultType="PlanVO">
    SELECT P.PLAN_ID,
           P.PLAN_NAME,
           NVL(D.DETAIL_DESC, '없음') AS DETAIL_DESC,
           DECODE(P.PLAN_TYPE, 'A', '기본형', 'B', '프리미엄', 'C', '엔터프라이즈', '미분류') AS PLAN_TYPE_NM,
           TO_CHAR(P.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DT
    FROM TB_PLAN P, TB_PLAN_DETAIL D
    WHERE P.PLAN_ID = D.PLAN_ID(+)
    <if test="planType != null">
      AND P.PLAN_TYPE = #{planType}
    </if>
    <if test="startDate != null">
      AND P.START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
    </if>
    ORDER BY P.PLAN_ID
</select>

<select id="selectPlanHierarchy" resultType="map">
    SELECT PLAN_ID,
           PLAN_NAME,
           PARENT_PLAN_ID,
           LEVEL AS DEPTH,
           SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(PLAN_NAME, '/') AS FULL_PATH
    FROM TB_PLAN
    WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
    START WITH PARENT_PLAN_ID IS NULL
    CONNECT BY PRIOR PLAN_ID = PARENT_PLAN_ID
</select>

<delete id="deletePlan" parameterType="String">
    DELETE FROM TB_PLAN
    WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId}
</delete>

<update id="mergePlanStats" parameterType="map">
    MERGE INTO TB_PLAN_STATS T
    USING (SELECT #{planId} AS PLAN_ID FROM DUAL) S
    ON (T.PLAN_ID = S.PLAN_ID)
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
        UPDATE SET VIEW_CNT = T.VIEW_CNT + 1, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (PLAN_ID, VIEW_CNT, REG_DATE)
        VALUES (S.PLAN_ID, 1, SYSDATE)
</update>
